title: Argentinian Crusted Chicken Hash
description: A flavorful and crunchy chicken hash dish inspired by Argentinian cuisine, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: hash browns
ingredients.notes: shredded, cooked according to package instructions

instructions: Season the chicken breast with crusted seasoning and deliciously seasoned oil.
Cook the millet according to package instructions.
Shred the hash browns and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet and stir in the shredded hash browns.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the hash browns are crispy and golden.
Serve the chicken on top of the hash browns, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve with a side of cooked millet.
